---
title: 'Guest Reviews Wanted!'
date: '2016-05-29T01:41:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5500430421835706456'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/guest-reviews-wanted.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'VOTE'
  - 'Navigate'
  - 'Discover'
  - 'Enjoy'
---

I need your help... Now Accepting Guest Posts and Reviews.<br />
<br />
<!--more--><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/guest-post-lifw-5edd3920f4e4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="193" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/guest-post-lifw-d1dca5cddbe2.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<h4>
<b>Too Many Projects</b></h4>
<br />
You ever have too many ideas to implement them all, or keep up with them if you do?<br />
<br />
I'm constantly learning, studying, and writing on a variety of topics.<br />
<br />
My main site. <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a>, is a hub for all my crazy content. I've also decided to start the process of moving to Coeur d'Alene Idaho; and I won't be able to review Fort Worth directly from there. As such, I'm going to start my personal reviews on another site <a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">LIFE In Review (s)</a>.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
<b>My Dilema</b></h4>
<br />
I created this site to be specific to Fort Worth, Texas; and the surrounding area. With all my other projects, and my move to Idaho, I cannot add to this site as often as I'd like. But there is still value here for people interesting in Fort Worth.<br />
<br />
<b><br /></b>
<br />
<h4>
<b>The Offer</b></h4>
<br />
I need your help, and I'd like to help you too. If you have a review you'd like to write for this site, I'm taking Guest Posts.<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>If you'd like to send a guest post, send it in the body of your email or a Word Doc to <a href="mailto:Me@DarrellWolfe.com">Me@DarrellWolfe.com</a>.</b></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<b>Reviews:</b><br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
You can review anything from an attraction, restaurant, tourist site, parks, and more. Anything that would help someone Discover, Navigate, and/or Enjoy LIFE in Fort Worth, Texas.</blockquote>
<br />
<b>How To's:</b><br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Is there something you know (or a frustration you've experienced) about living in the DFW Metroplex? Getting around, drivers licences, voting, whatever? Feel free to help others Navigate the Wild West of Fort Worth.</blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
<b>Requirements:</b></h4>
<br />
These are the general headlines or points of the review. Try to come up with something for each section.<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>Name &amp;&nbsp;</b><b>Address&nbsp;</b>(of place or activity, link to site too?)</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Overview </b>- Walk us through the experience from start to finish. Consider the taste, touch, smells, ambiance, etc.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Cost </b>- What was the general cost, and what did you pay? Is this a daily place, or a special occasion budget?</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Kids </b>- How is it for kids? Even if they have things for kids, is it really kid friendly?&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Final Thoughts </b>- Give us anything we need to know that would set us up for success to enjoy the experience, things we'd be surprised to know, things we'd wish we knew before coming, parking... and then conclude with any other thoughts you had.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Credits </b>- Include anything you'd like to say about yourself, one link to your own site/blog, and instruction about anything you'd like to me to include (or not include) about you.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Formatting </b>- Do not include any formatting. Just single spaced content in an email body or Word Doc. I will remove formatting and start fresh if I decide to post it.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Picture Optional </b>- If you happen to snap a good photo (or more) of the place/activity, feel free to include that too.</li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
<b>Disclosures:</b></h4>
<br />
<ul>
<li>I reserve the right to decide which submissions to use and which not to use.&nbsp;</li>
<li>I reserve the right to edit the review for the needs of this site.</li>
<li>I may not get to you right away, as it says up top, I'm busy (which is why I'm doing this).&nbsp;</li>
<li>The content you submit belongs to you and me. Even if I use it here, feel free to post it anywhere else you'd like.</li>
<li>I may make money off of this site in the form of Affiliate or Ad Links. The profits from those links belong solely to this site and Darrell Wolfe (owner). However, you can still benefit from the traffic back to your own site.</li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
